title: portulaca mexicana
intro: Portulaca mexicana, also known as Mexican purslane or verdolaga, is a succulent plant belonging to the Portulacaceae family. It is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant offers several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Portulaca mexicana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used as a garnish or added to salads, making it a versatile and nutritious herb.
